panels.title: Revenue (selected range)
panels.description: Sum of order totals for orders that reached payment (paid/processing/shipped/delivered).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_cents),0)/100.0 AS revenue FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','processing','shipped','delivered') AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS orders FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','processing','shipped','delivered') AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total_cents),0)/100.0 AS aov FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','processing','shipped','delivered') AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS registrations FROM users WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, SUM(total_cents)/100.0 AS revenue FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','processing','shipped','delivered') AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, AVG(total_cents)/100.0 AS aov FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','processing','shipped','delivered') AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Revenue by category
panels.description: Which categories drive revenue — underperformers are candidates for promotion or delisting.

targets.rawSql: SELECT c.name AS category, SUM(oi.unit_price_cents*oi.quantity)/100.0 AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE o.status IN ('paid','processing','shipped','delivered') AND $__timeFilter(o.created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS registrations FROM users WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cart abandonment rate (daily)
panels.description: Carts with items, idle for over an hour, whose owner never placed an order afterwards — as a share of all carts with items created that day.

targets.rawSql: WITH cw AS (SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.guest_session_id, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM carts c WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM cart_items ci WHERE ci.cart_id = c.id)) SELECT date_trunc('day', cw.created_at) AS time, 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cw.updated_at < now() - interval '1 hour' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE (o.user_id = cw.user_id OR o.guest_session_id = cw.guest_session_id) AND o.created_at >= cw.created_at)) / COUNT(*) AS abandonment FROM cw WHERE $__timeFilter(cw.created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Correlated: AOV — guest vs registered
panels.description: Registered customers consistently spend more per order than guests. The gap is the money left on the table by not converting guests: it sizes the value of account-creation nudges at checkout, which a single overall AOV number cannot show.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, CASE WHEN user_id IS NULL THEN 'guest' ELSE 'registered' END AS metric, AVG(total_cents)/100.0 AS aov FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','processing','shipped','delivered') AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
